message:
test(init): add state directory bootstrap integration tests

Add comprehensive test coverage for the bootstrap_state_directory()
function introduced in the earlier init feature commit:

- bootstrap_creates_all_directories: verifies all STATE_BOOTSTRAP_SUBDIRS
  are created under .franken-node/, counts DirectoryCreated actions
- bootstrap_creates_empty_trust_registry: verifies trust-card-registry.v1.json
  is created with correct schema_version and empty cards_by_extension
- bootstrap_creates_gitignore: verifies .gitignore is written excluding
  keys/ and execution-receipts/
- bootstrap_idempotent_second_run: runs bootstrap twice, verifies second
  run produces SkippedExisting actions instead of DirectoryCreated
- keys_dir_has_restricted_permissions (unix-only): verifies keys/
  directory gets 0700 permissions

All tests use tempfile::TempDir for isolation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
